zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Mary Heston於1465年出生在英國越可爾吉爾德索時，她的父親Sir Zebulon Heston III63歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Buckman56歲。她於1479年與Sir John Hurst II在英國英格蘭奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1540年1月28日在英國奧可福爾可姆享年75歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾可姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Mary Heston于1465年出生在英国越可爾吉爾德索时，她的父亲Sir Zebulon Heston III63岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Buckman56岁。她于1479年与Sir John Hurst II在英国英格兰奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1540年1月28日在英国奧可福爾可姆享年75岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾可姆。

nameMeanings.name: Heston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

variants.name: Hastings
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: Of uncertain origin. If not simply an invention, it may have been devised as a feminine equivalent of   Alan   (of which it is an anagram), or a shortened form of   Alana .  It seems to have been first used by the American film actress  Lana Turner  (  1920–1995 ), whose original name was  Julia .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Mary Heston was born in 1465, in Gildersome, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Zebulon Heston III, was 63 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Buckman, was 56. She married Sir John Hurst II in 1479, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 28 January 1540, in Combe, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in Combe, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Mary Heston est née en 1465, à Gildersome, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Zebulon Heston III, avait 63 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Buckman, avait 56 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Hurst II en 1479, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 28 janvier 1540, à Combe, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Combe, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Mary Heston 1465 in Gildersome, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Zebulon Heston III 63 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Buckman 56. Sie hat 1479 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Hurst II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 28. Januar 1540 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Combe, Oxfordshire, England und wurde in Combe, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary Heston è nata il nel 1465 nel Gildersome, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Zebulon Heston III, aveva 63 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Buckman, aveva 56 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Hurst II nel 1479, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 28 gennaio 1540, nel Combe, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Combe, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Hestonが1465年にイギリスヨークシュアイアギルダーソメで生まれた時，父Sir Zebulon Heston IIIは63歳，母Lady Elizabeth Buckmanは56歳であった。1479年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでSir John Hurst IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1540年1月28日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアコンベで75歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアコンベにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Heston(이)가 1465년 영국 요르크실르 길더소에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Zebulon Heston III(은)는 63세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Buckman(은)는 56세였다. 그녀는 1479년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 Sir John Hurst II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1540년 1월 28일 영국 스퍼드실르 코브에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 코브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary Heston nasceu em 1465, em Gildersome, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Zebulon Heston III, tinha 63 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Buckman, tinha 56 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Hurst II em 1479, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 28 de janeiro de 1540, em Combe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Combe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Mary Heston родилась в 1465 г. в местности джаилдирсом, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Zebulon Heston III было 63 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Buckman, 56. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Hurst II в 1479 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 28 января 1540 г. в местности комб, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности комб, оксфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Mary Heston nació en 1465, en Gildersome, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Zebulon Heston III, tenía 63 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Buckman, tenía 56 años. Se casó con Sir John Hurst II en 1479, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 28 de enero de 1540, en Combe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Combe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
